---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for IliaGPT
title: "[FEAT] <short description of the feature>"
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
Thank you for helping shape the future of IliaGPT!
Please fill in as much detail as possible so we can evaluate and prioritize your request.
-->

## Is Your Feature Request Related to a Problem?

<!-- Describe the pain point or limitation that motivated this request.
E.g. "I'm always frustrated when I try to X but the system does Y instead, forcing me to work around it by Z." -->


---

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you want.
What should it do? How should it behave? What does success look like? -->


---

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

<!-- Have you tried other approaches, workarounds, or third-party tools?
What are their limitations compared to your proposed solution? -->


---

## Which Capability Category Does This Affect?

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] **Chat & Conversation** — core chat, context management, history
- [ ] **Document Generation** — Word, PDF, reports, templates
- [ ] **Spreadsheet & Data** — Excel generation, analysis, pivot tables
- [ ] **Presentation** — slide deck creation, PPTX
- [ ] **Code Generation & Execution** — coding assistant, sandbox execution
- [ ] **Browser Automation** — web scraping, UI automation (OpenClaw)
- [ ] **Web Search & Research** — internet access, deep research
- [ ] **File & Document Processing** — ingestion, parsing, OCR
- [ ] **Long-Term Memory** — fact extraction, cross-session recall
- [ ] **Multi-Agent Orchestration** — LangGraph pipelines, sub-agents
- [ ] **Integrations & MCP Connectors** — Slack, Notion, GitHub, Jira, etc.
- [ ] **Scheduled Tasks & Triggers** — cron, webhooks, reminders
- [ ] **Image Understanding** — vision, image analysis
- [ ] **Audio / Voice** — transcription, TTS
- [ ] **Authentication & Security** — OAuth, RBAC, CSRF, rate limiting
- [ ] **Deployment & Infrastructure** — Docker, scaling, observability
- [ ] **Developer API** — OpenAI-compatible API, API keys
- [ ] **UI / UX** — web interface, artifacts panel, search modal
- [ ] **Other / Cross-cutting**: ___________

---

## Which LLM Providers Should This Work With?

<!-- Check all that should be supported (or that you care most about) -->

- [ ] OpenAI (GPT-4o, o3, etc.)
- [ ] Anthropic (Claude 3.5 / 3.7 / 4)
- [ ] Google Gemini
- [ ] xAI (Grok)
- [ ] DeepSeek
- [ ] Cerebras
- [ ] Mistral
- [ ] Cohere
- [ ] Groq
- [ ] Together AI
- [ ] OpenRouter
- [ ] Fireworks AI
- [ ] Perplexity
- [ ] Azure OpenAI
- [ ] Ollama (local)
- [ ] LM Studio (local)
- [ ] All providers
- [ ] Provider-agnostic (infrastructure / UI)

<!-- Complete the template below to describe who benefits and why. -->

> **As a** [type of user: developer / end user / enterprise admin / ...],
> **I want** [the feature or capability],
> **so that** [the benefit or outcome I get].

As a ___________,
I want ___________,
so that ___________.

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- List the specific, testable conditions that must be true for this feature to be considered complete.
Good acceptance criteria are concrete and verifiable. -->

- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [observable result].
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [observable result].
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [observable result].
- [ ] Existing tests continue to pass.
- [ ] The feature is documented in the relevant docs file.
- [ ] (Add more criteria as needed)

---

## Implementation Notes

<!-- Optional: Any technical hints, constraints, or design ideas that might help an implementer.
E.g. relevant files, APIs, existing patterns that should be followed, known edge cases. -->


---

## Priority Justification

<!-- Why should this be prioritized over other work?
Describe the impact: How many users does this affect? Is there a business/compliance need? Does it unblock other work? -->

**Impact:** <!-- High / Medium / Low -->
**Urgency:** <!-- Blocking / Near-term / Nice-to-have -->
**Justification:**

## Would You Be Willing to Implement This?

- [ ] Yes, I would like to submit a pull request for this feature.
- [ ] Yes, but I would need guidance from a maintainer first.
- [ ] No, I am requesting this from the team.
